name: Handshake Career Platform
overview: Handshake is Morgan's official job and internship platform for students and alumni. It is the primary starting point for internships, jobs, and employer connections.

name: Internship Stipend Program
overview: Morgan's Center for Career Development publishes an Internship Stipend Program that provides financial support for unpaid internships to help students cover essential career-related expenses.

name: ScholarshipUniverse
overview: ScholarshipUniverse is Morgan State University's scholarship-matching tool for admitted and current students and is a strong official starting point for scholarship searches.

name: CreativeEdge Mini-Grants
overview: CreativeEdge Mini-Grants are official Morgan undergraduate mini-grants that support faculty-mentored research and creative inquiry projects.

name: Research Internships Path
overview: Morgan's Office of Undergraduate Research is the official starting point for students asking about research internships, undergraduate research experiences, and faculty-mentored experiential learning.
